summary: Tenant experiences at The Grant (730 S Clark St) appear to be mixed based on available mentions. While some residents express satisfaction with the building, unit quality, and location, others have raised concerns about management practices and lease-related issues. The building benefits from an excellent location near Grant Park and transit options, but experiences seem to vary depending on individual circumstances and interactions with management.
